name: rAthena Equipment Knowledge Pack
description: Knowledge about weapons, armor, headgears, shields, view IDs, and visual sprite mapping in Ragnarok clients.

entries.title: Weapon and Headgear View IDs
entries.summary: How custom weapons and headgears resolve their visual sprites.
entries.details: Weapons and headgears use a 'View' field in the server-side database. For weapons, this View corresponds to a weapon type or custom visual index. For headgears, this View matches a custom visual sprite ID. On the client, this ID is registered inside 'System/itemInfo.lua' and mapped to a sprite folder path.
warnings: Using a duplicate View ID or registering a custom shield visual sprite in client-side tables is blocked or raises warnings to prevent sprite glitches.

entries.title: Built-in Shield Sprite Constraints
entries.summary: Limitations of custom shield sprite registrations.
entries.details: Ragnarok Online clients hardcode shield visual sprites based on predefined indices. Registering custom shield visuals (beyond built-in ones) will result in client exceptions or rendering crashes. RagnaForge validates that shield-like visual IDs match allowed built-in indices.
warnings: Custom shield registrations outside the default schema will raise validation errors and fail dry-runs.
